name: loam
description: Workflow skills for AI coding agents: planning, specs, memory, checkpoints, and agent debates.

interface.shortDescription: Planning, memory, and checkpoint skills for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Use loam to give an agent a structured way to plan work, research questions, execute plans, and maintain a persistent knowledge base — so sessions build on each other instead of starting from scratch.
defaultPrompt: Let's plan this feature before building it.
Save what we learned this session to memory.
